sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15809" key="a)/rusos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄρυσος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15809.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wicker-basket,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4099.tlg001:1:213" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.213</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n15809.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄρρυσος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not wrinkled, smooth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:126" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.126</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
